channel.title: Articles on Pablo Díez
channel.description: Recent content in Articles on Pablo Díez

item.title: C++ *type_traits*, from a multithreading perspective
item.description:
C++ type_traits, from a multithreading perspective #

C++11 was the first C++ standard to introduce concurrency. Before that the only way to have multiple threads running was with external libraries or calling the operating system’s API. Since then, the standard has come a long way, evolving and meeting the needs of its users. Today I would like to bring you back to the basics, and show how this library could help with a basic concurrency problem.
